name: DYNATRONICS CORP
summary: Dynatronics Corporation is a Utah-based medical device company that designs, manufactures, and sells restorative products for physical therapy, rehabilitation, orthopedics, pain management, and athletic training. Products include orthopedic soft bracing, treatment tables, therapeutic modalities (electrotherapy, ultrasound, phototherapy, traction), and rehabilitation equipment. Brands include Bird & Cronin, Solaris, Hausmann, PROTEAM, and Mammoth. The company sells through 100+ independent dealers and direct sales representatives to orthopedists, physical therapists, chiropractors, athletic trainers, hospitals, and clinics.

products.name: Bird & Cronin Orthopedic Soft Bracing
products.description: Cervical collars, shoulder immobilizers, arm slings, wrist/elbow supports, knee immobilizers, ankle walkers, and cold therapy products.

products.name: Solaris Therapeutic Modalities
products.description: Electrotherapy, ultrasound, phototherapy, traction, hot and cold therapy devices, and electrodes for clinical use.

products.name: Hausmann Treatment Tables
products.description: Power and manually operated treatment tables, mat platforms, work tables, parallel bars, training stairs, and weight racks.

products.name: PROTEAM Rehabilitation Equipment
products.description: Physical therapy and athletic training equipment for rehabilitation and clinical settings.

products.name: Mammoth Products
products.description: Rehabilitation and physical therapy products marketed under the Mammoth brand.

partnerships.description: Dynatronics sells products through equipment manufacturer (OEM) partners as part of its distribution network.
